_comment: Vortex preset: rotate around +Y by 30° with cylinder-falloff weighting (radial-perpendicular-to-axis). Mirrors MODO `xfrm.vortex` (falloff.cylinder + xfrm.rotate). MODO comparison via analytical reference because xfrm.rotate's headless `angle` doApply is unreliable (per modo_dump.py:run_xfrm_rotate). Vibe3d's RotateTool path is what's verified — the cylinder falloff math is asserted to match across both engines' implementations of the formula.
